name: Reframing AI Loss of Control: What Control Is, How to Have It, How to Lose It

description: arXiv:2606.12442v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: At present, loss of control risks have gained much prominence in public discussion, particularly in relation to AI, with extensive discourse present among academics, frontier labs, and even governments.
